_provenance: schema-derived from analytics.py:560-698 + alpha_bot_execution.py:768,907-916 + adjudicator verdict 2026-06-03
_note: The correct guard-alpha divergence formula is: (prod_shadow - prod_current) * 100, NOT (prod_shadow - 1) * 100. For untriggered symphonies shadow_return == current_return every day so prod_shadow == prod_current and divergence == 0 exactly. For triggered symphonies shadow_return is frozen at exit while current_return keeps moving, capturing exactly what the guard saved or cost.
_derivation: prod = ∏(1 + r/100); divergence = (prod_shadow - prod_current) * 100; dry_run = if_held + divergence

untriggered_never_touched.description: Symphony the guard never triggered. shadow_return == current_return every day. Guard alpha MUST be exactly 0.0.
untriggered_never_touched._tolerance: abs=1e-9 — divergence must be exactly zero, not approximately

triggered_guard_acted.description: 3-day position. Days 1-2 pre-trigger (shadow==current). Day 3: trigger fires. shadow_return frozen at -2.0 (exit level); current_return = +0.3 (market moved up after exit). Guard alpha = divergence = (prod_shadow - prod_current)*100.
triggered_guard_acted._tolerance: abs=1e-6 for float arithmetic on small values
